html:
Exclusive to:

“When used by webber, nearby aggressive spiders become passive and releases spiders following Webber.”

-

The Shoo Box is an item which can only be crafted and used by Webber, and exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It pacifies attacking spiders and dismisses any following spiders.

Trivia

  • The Shoo Box was added as part of Webber's Character Refresh Update.
  • Shoo Box is a homophone of shoebox, and shooing.
    • However, the Shoo Box itself is fashioned after a Noisemaker.

Gallery

  • Shoo Box concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Shoo Box animation concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Shoo Box
"Let your friends know you need some space."
Object Info
Perk
Repel spiders.
10 uses
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×2 ×1 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"spider_repellent"
“If only science could make it work for me.”
–Wilson
“Well it might not work, but at least it makes noise!”
–Willow
“Is clicky clacky spider box.”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing I try seems to work well for me.”
–Wendy
“IT LOOKS SUSPICIOUSLY TOY-LIKE”
–WX-78
“Unfortunately, it seems that the arachnids only respond to one of their kind.”
–Wickerbottom
“A nice bit of woodworking there, kiddo.”
–Woodie
“If only loud noises were really enough to deter them.”
–Maxwell
“The spiderchild uses it to manage his horde.”
–Wigfrid
“Ms. Wickerbottom said our friends need to go home if they don't behave.”
–Webber
“Unfortunately, it seems only spiders can shoo other spiders.”
–Warly
“Clicky-clack!”
–Wormwood
“Guess it can only be used by a spider specialist.”
–Winona
“The easiest way to get rid of a spider is with a big shoo, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It goes clicky-clacky-clak!”
–Wurt
“Aw, why would I want the spiders to go away?”
–Walter
“I wish he used it more often.”
–Wanda
“When used by webber, nearby aggressive spiders become passive and releases spiders following Webber.”
-
The Shoo Box is an item which can only be crafted and used by Webber, and exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It pacifies attacking spiders and dismisses any following spiders.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Shoo Box was added as part of Webber's Character Refresh Update.
Shoo Box is a homophone of shoebox, and shooing.
However, the Shoo Box itself is fashioned after a Noisemaker.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Shoo Box concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.
Shoo Box animation concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.

The '''Shoo Box''' is an item which can only be crafted and used by [[Webber]], and exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It pacifies attacking spiders and dismisses any following spiders.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Shoo Box was added as part of [[Don't Starve/Version History|Webber's Character Refresh Update]].
* Shoo Box is a homophone of shoebox, and shooing.
** However, the Shoo Box itself is fashioned after a Noisemaker.
